clientMessages.author: glenn_64760
clientMessages.content: A few questions, David asked me to check Discord for a message, and when I did, there was nothing there. I was assuming he found out info about Meta giving me error codes about payment. I checked with my bank, and there are no security restrictions, and they said Meta was pinging my account with $0.00. So, they say it is going through.
